summary: Completed testing of Chat-from-Lead feature. All backend tests (10/10) passed and all frontend UI tests passed. The chat icon on lead cards navigates to Chat IA page with lead_id param (not WhatsApp). The lead-session endpoint finds or creates sessions linked to leads. Chat header displays lead name and funnel stage badge. Message sending, new conversation, and delete conversation all work correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/chat/lead-session/{lead_id} returns session_id, lead info, messages, is_new flag
GET /api/chat/lead-session/{lead_id} returns same session on second call (not duplicate)
POST /api/chat/message with lead_id links message to lead
GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} shows messages linked to lead
GET /api/chat/sessions shows lead_id and lead_name for sessions
POST /api/chat/message without lead_id creates unlinked session
Backend parses [UPDATE_LEAD:field=value] tags (code verified - allowed fields: whatsapp, city, product_interest, email)
Backend system prompt includes DATOS FALTANTES instruction for missing fields
Frontend: Chat icon (MessageSquare) on lead card navigates to /chat?lead_id={id} (not wa.me)
Frontend: ChatPage loads lead-session API with lead_id from URL params
Frontend: Chat header shows 'Asesor Fakulti — {LeadName}' format
Frontend: Chat header displays funnel stage badge (Prospecto, Interesado, etc.)
Frontend: Sessions sidebar shows 7+ existing sessions
Frontend: Can send message in chat linked to specific lead (GPT-5.2 response received)
Frontend: New Conversation button creates fresh session (clears messages)
Frontend: Delete conversation works (shows 'Conversacion eliminada' toast)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing ~35 leads from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat-from-lead feature fully implemented and tested. The LeadsPage openChat() function navigates to /chat?lead_id={id}. ChatPage reads lead_id from useSearchParams, calls lead-session API, then clears URL param after loading. The lead-session endpoint (GET /api/chat/lead-session/{lead_id}) returns existing session or creates new one. Chat header shows lead name with stage badge. GPT-5.2 AI integration is working - responses include product info and ask for missing client data. [UPDATE_LEAD:field=value] parsing is in server.py but AI tag inclusion is non-deterministic.
